message:
Adapt `.gitignore` to cover workaround of claude plugins bug (#5717)

Currently always getting my repo state dirty when running `claude`
because of the files that are being copied for the hooks.

@mavam Let me know if this is not the correct solution.

files.patch:
@@ -52,3 +52,6 @@ CLAUDE-TODOS.md
 # SBOM artifacts
 /tenzir.spdx.json
 .reviews/
+
+# Files created by the workaround of the Claude plugins bug
+.claude/*/dev:*
